Applying to 01110011
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 AND 57 = AND(I 5,I 7) = AND(0,1) = 0
1 C 1n = NOT(1) = 0
2 C 2n = NOT(1) = 0
3 C 3n = NOT(1) = 0
4 C 4n = NOT(1) = 0
5 C 5n = NOT(1) = 0
6 C 6n = NOT(1) = 0
